title: PURPOSE® Berlin Fireside: 'What Does It Take to Stay Incorruptible?'
summary: Steward-ownership organization PURPOSE® hosts an intimate fireside chat with Eric Ries in Berlin to explore how Incorruptible aligns with steward-ownership and rethinking the role of business in society.
blockquote: What needs to change in how businesses are owned and designed for them to remain aligned with their purpose under systemic pressure? We'll dive into the themes from the book and discuss with Eric how his thinking aligns with steward-ownership, why he chose a different name, and how we can join forces to rethink ownership and the role of business in society today.
